ground_truth.title: Continuing Education Certificate Programs & Courses | NYU SPS
ground_truth.main_content: Career-boosting Continuing Education: Gain in-demand skills and credentials for rapidly evolving workplaces. In today's fast-paced job market shaped by disruptive technology, employers seek innovators who are driving the future. Our flexible continuing education courses—available online or in person—prepare you for the future of work by helping you build specialized, in-demand skills. To develop a deeper skill set, you can combine multiple courses into a continuing education certificate, which provides specialized credentials and elective options to build expertise and boost your marketability. Statistics: 85+ non-credit certificates offered, 600+ courses offered, 3.9K students enrolled annually. Last Chance Courses: Get an early start on spring with January courses. Starting Jan. 5-16 courses include Calculus Prep, Data Centers Demystified, Introduction to Python Programming, Advanced Python Programming. Starting Jan. 19-23 courses include Social Media Marketing Analytics, Achieving Customer Centricity, Social Media Community Management, Analyzing the Digital Consumer, Tools for Application of LLMs to Marketing & Advertising Research, Foundations of Coaching, Public Relations: The Principles of the Practice, Project Management Professional (PMP) Certification Exam Prep. Starting Jan. 24-26 and Jan. 26 courses include SHRM Certification Preparation, Accelerated Course in Restaurant Management and Operations, Coaching Engagements, Data Mining, Predictive Analytics, and Big Data, Project Management Foundations and Methods, Principles of Event Management, Foundations of Sports Analytics, Revenue Strategies and Pricing Analytics, The Genetic Code of Baseball: Sabermetrics and the Next Generation of Statistical Analysis, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, The Business of Esports, Foundations in Digital Disruption, Blockchain in Sports, Immersive Media in the Age of AI, Virtual Reality, and Augmented Reality. Featured Programs: New Certificate - Certificate in Remote Work Success. Spotlight on AI courses include AI for Impact: Boost Your Marketability and Organizational Growth, AI Foundations: A Hands-On Course for Unlocking Everyday Productivity, Communications and AI, Introduction to AI: A Beginner's Guide to Using AI in Your Everyday Life, Immersive Media in the Age of AI, Virtual Reality, and Augmented Reality, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. Trending Certificates include Data Analytics, Electricity Industry Essentials: Project Development and Finance Pathways, Communications and AI (Accelerated), Accelerated Restaurant Management and Operations, Affordable Housing, Events and Convention Management, Writing and Producing for Film & Television, Sports Analytics, Clean Energy. Area of Study filters available: AI, Data & Technology, Arts & Humanities, Building Design & Construction, Entrepreneurship, Finance, Fundraising, Global & Public Affairs, Hospitality & Events Management, Human Capital Management, Leadership & Management, Marketing & PR, Publishing, Writing & Media, Project Management, Real Estate, Sports.
